app.name: MSN Weather (newRetiled)
app.description: MSN Weather: The best way to plan your day. Get the latest weather conditions, whether you're hitting the slopes, or the beach, or checking the forecast for your commute. See accurate 10-day and hourly forecasts for whatever you do. Patched with newRetiled, credit to migbrunluz.

app.name: Adobe Photoshop Express
app.description: Download Photoshop Express and start exploring. Edit photos and videos, add creative effects, and more with Photoshop Express.
